case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. BERTA NAJARRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,262.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NAJARRO, BERTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPEARANCE PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIL--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-04-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---NINA SAFDIE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
